title: Solara Canmore Studio
definition: This studio unit in Solara Canmore shows approximately -$1,000/month under typical STR assumptions — tight margins and high fixed costs per square foot.
reality_check: Studios compete on rate more than bedrooms
Winter demand helps but fees dominate
Management fees hit harder on small units

good_for: Owners who use the unit part-time

faq.q: Can a Solara studio cash flow in Canmore?
faq.a: Rarely at market pricing without very high occupancy; most models show thin or negative monthly cash after fees.
Condo fees and financing on a small revenue base — a few empty weeks erase the margin.
No — verify with your lender and a local property manager before buying.
